Scoring Factor: Siddhi Yoga / Amrit / Sarvartha (+8)
Scoring Factor: Gochar (transit) from Janma Rashi (−30 to +30)
Abhijit Muhurta (8th day-muhurta, void on Wednesday)
Sade Sati (Saturn in 12/1/2 from Janma Rasi)
Rationale: Borrowing favours light/waxing, Lending its sharp/waning inverse (funds should return)
Rationale: Severance principle — sharp stars + Mars/Saturn + waning Moon to cleanly cut ties
Rationale: Chitra ruled by Vishvakarma (divine craftsman) favours arts/jewelry
Rationale: Ashwini = Ashwini Kumaras (divine physicians) favours medicine/healing
Rationale: Purva Phalguni (Bhaga, pleasure) avoided for wedding's dharma
Rationale: Fixed/Sthira stars chosen for permanence (construction, foundations, deity)
